title: The Giants’ Island Awakens
description: On pages 17–18, the giants’ island awakens as the Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger.
scene: The Giants’ Island Awakens. The Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Getting in the way of our fight!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
